case_title: GALLARDO MIKE E.DBA BAY CITY LOCKSMITH VS HUFFUMAN MRS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $92.89 FILED BY GALLARDO MIKE E.DBA BAY CITY LOCKSMITH AS TO DEFENDANT HUFFUMAN MRS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO MRS. HUFFMAN RETURNED SIGNED.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $165.00 FILED BY HUFFUMAN MRS. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GALLARDO MIKE E.DBA BAY CITY LOCKSMITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO MIKE GALLARDO RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALLARDO MIKE E.DBA BAY CITY LOCKSMITH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUFFUMAN MRS. $92.89 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $112.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HUFFUMAN MRS. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GALLARDO MIKE E.DBA BAY CITY LOCKSMITH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HUFFUMAN MRS.
